payload.title: Eval runner: 'Run complete' printed even when all calls error
payload.description: run_cross_provider.py reports 'Run NNN complete' and exits 0 even when every single sample errored (e.g. 30/30 'ERROR: No module named openai' still printed the success line). Fix: track per-call success, exit non-zero if any failed, and surface a summary line like 'N succeeded, M failed' before the next-steps block.
